stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
You are planning a flight from Ostend (52°N 003°E) to Düsseldorf (51°N 007°E), following the route indicated on the chart. Your estimated time of arrival at Düsseldorf is 1600 UTC. The terrain in the vicinity of Düsseldorf is about 200 feet above mean sea level. Based on the forecast, what is the minimum visibility expected at your time of arrival?
